title: Hoppers
description: A college student transfers her consciousness into a robotic beaver to infiltrate the animal kingdom.

title: The Bride!
description: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to seek the aid of a Dr. Euphronius in creating a companion.

title: Reminders of Him
description: A young mother released from prison seeks redemption and a relationship with the daughter she left behind.

title: Project Hail Mary
description: An amnesiac astronaut wakes up on a spacecraft and must use science to save humanity.

title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
description: Grace returns for another deadly round of hide-and-seek with a new set of lethal rules.

title: They Will Kill You
description: A housekeeper takes a job in a high-end building and discovers the residents belong to a cult.

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
description: Mario and Luigi venture into deep space to save the Sparkies from a cosmic threat.

title: Michael
description: A sweeping biopic exploring the complicated life and career of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
description: Miranda Priestly faces the decline of traditional publishing while her former assistant, Emily, is now an executive.

title: Mortal Kombat II
description: The tournament continues as Earthrealm's champions travel to Outworld to face Shao Kahn.

title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
description: The bounty hunter Din Djarin and his apprentice Grogu embark on a new cinematic adventure.

title: Masters of the Universe
description: Prince Adam must use the Power of Grayskull to defend Eternia from the evil sorcerer Skeletor.

title: Toy Story 5
description: Woody and Buzz return as toys face a new challenge in the age of electronic gadgets.

title: Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow
description: Kara Zor-El travels across the galaxy on a journey of revenge and discovery in the new DC Universe.

title: Moana (Live Action)
description: A live-action adaptation of Disney's animated classic about a spirited teenager who sails out to save her people.

title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
description: Peter Parker navigates life as an anonymous hero in New York while facing a rising street-level crime wave.

title: Evil Dead Burn
description: The Necronomicon surfaces again, unleashing Deadite terror in a claustrophobic urban setting.

title: Flowervale Street
description: A family deals with a mysterious and possibly supernatural event occurring on their quiet suburban street.

title: Digger
description: A man tries to prove he is humanity's savior before a disaster he caused destroys everything.

title: Street Fighter
description: A new generation of martial artists competes in a global tournament to determine the world's strongest.

title: The Cat in the Hat
description: An animated retelling of the Dr. Seuss classic about a mischievous cat bringing chaos to siblings.

title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
description: Set 24 years before the original trilogy, this prequel follows the 50th Hunger Games and Haymitch Abernathy.

title: Dune: Part Three
description: Paul Atreides faces the consequences of his rise to power as the Emperor and the messiah of the Fremen.

title: Avengers: Doomsday
description: The Avengers reunite to face a multiversal threat in the form of Doctor Doom.

title: Star Wars: A New Hope
description: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight and a cocky pilot to save the galaxy from the Empire.

title: Back to the Future
description: Marty McFly is accidentally sent thirty years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean.

title: Jurassic Park
description: A theme park is tasked with protecting visitors after a power failure causes cloned dinosaurs to run loose.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and a gangster's wife intertwine in tales of violence and redemption.

title: The Matrix
description: A computer hacker learns from rebels about the true nature of his reality.

title: Gladiator
description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.

title: Spider-Man
description: A shy teenager gains spider-like abilities and uses them to fight evil.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests to fight the menace known as the Joker.

title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the task of planting an idea.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
description: With Spider-Man's identity revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help, causing dangerous foes to appear.

title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
description: Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora from a nomadic tribe known as the 'Ash People'.
